text.tspan: Dieter Rams is one of the most influential
industrial designers of the twentieth century.
Trained as an architect and carpenter, he joined
Braun in 1955 and rose to become Head of
Design — a role he held for over three decades.
Good design makes a product useful
Aesthetic quality is integral to usefulness.
Neither decorative objects nor works of art.
Nothing must be arbitrary or left to chance.
Less, but better. Back to purity.
Dieter Rams is one of the most
MAX MCDONOUGH — EMILY CARR UNIVERSITY OF ART + DESIGN — MARCH 2026
